headline: Assessing Nucor (NUE) Valuation After Upbeat Analyst Revisions And Strong Share Price Momentum
summary: Analyst sentiment and momentum backdrop Recent analyst activity on Nucor (NUE), including several upward earnings estimate revisions and a favorable momentum rating, has drawn renewed attention to the stock as investors reassess its recent performance. See our latest analysis for Nucor. Nucor’s recent move to a US$250.00 share price sits against a strong upswing, with a 90 day share price return of 40.92% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 110.79%, suggesting momentum has been building...

headline: Reasons Why You Should Hold Nutrien Stock in Your Portfolio Now
summary: NTR gains from strong fertilizer demand, rising prices and cost cuts, but volatile input costs and supply tightness may weigh on margins.
